name: create_single_send
description: Create a single-send campaign to deliver emails to your contacts via Marketing Campaigns. Define the email template, subject line, audience segments, and schedule to reach specific contact groups with tailored messages.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: Human-readable name for this single-send campaign. Used for identification in the dashboard.

parameters.name: template_id
parameters.description: SendGrid Dynamic Template ID to use for the email content. Must be a valid template ID.

parameters.name: categories
parameters.description: Optional categories to tag this campaign for organization and reporting.

parameters.name: send_at
parameters.description: ISO 8601 timestamp for when to send the campaign. If omitted, the campaign is saved as a draft and can be sent manually.

parameters.name: send_to
parameters.description: Audience targeting. Can use 'all_contacts', 'segment_ids', or 'contact_list_ids' to specify recipients.

parameters.name: subject
parameters.description: Email subject line. Can include dynamic content using handlebars syntax: {{first_name}}

parameters.name: plain_content
parameters.description: Plain text version of the email. Used as fallback if template doesn't have plain text.

parameters.name: html_content
parameters.description: HTML version of the email. Used as fallback if template doesn't have HTML.
